title: Floral Creamy Portuguese Lemongrass Frittata
description: A vegetarian-friendly brunch dish featuring lemongrass and a floral twist, inspired by Portuguese cuisine. This creamy frittata is perfect for a relaxing morning meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped lemongrass and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, grated cheese, dried lavender buds, salt, and pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the lemongrass in the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes or until the frittata is almost set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata onto a plate and garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
